footer.tagline: Building an empowered future with advanced AI.

home.heroTitle: Our mission is to build an empowered future with advanced AI, making it accessible, scalable, and human-centered for the people who need it most.
home.heroTagline: Your AI design firm — scale your business with AI
home.servicesSubheading: Whether you're just starting out or leading an established enterprise, we're committed to understanding your goals and helping you achieve them.
home.why1Text: We stay on top of the latest and greatest in AI tools so you don't have to.
home.why2Text: Rather than using a one-size-fits-all model we study your business and customize.
home.why3Text: Using AI allows us to analyze and design for problems ranging from micro to global.

about.heading: about us
about.intro: We are an AI-first company helping businesses unlock human potential through emerging technology. Using cutting-edge tools, we build scalable, ethical solutions that empower organizations to adopt AI with clarity, confidence, and purpose.
about.missionText: Our mission is to build the future with advanced AI, making it accessible, scalable, and human-centered for the people who need it most.
about.value1Text: AI is incredibly powerful and requires adherence to ethical usage standards.
about.value2Title: We don't take just any clients
about.value2Text: We prioritize work which is top quality, collaborative, and high-impact.
about.value3Text: We mean that in every possible way it could be interpreted.
about.careersText: Tell us why and how by dropping us an email:

contentGeneration.title: Content Generation
contentGeneration.short: You are starting from scratch and want high quality ideas for products and services.
contentGeneration.long: Need fresh ideas fast? Our AI-powered content and idea generation service helps creators, entrepreneurs, and teams spark innovation in seconds. Whether you're brainstorming product names, social media content, startup concepts, or campaign slogans, our AI delivers tailored, high-quality suggestions based on your goals and audience. No more creative blocks—just endless possibilities.

conceptVisualization.title: Concept Visualization
conceptVisualization.short: You have some abstract ideas but need to add detail and amazing visuals.
conceptVisualization.long: Bring your ideas to life with our AI-powered concept visualization service. We use the latest and greatest AI tools to transform rough concepts into stunning, high-impact visuals—fast. Whether you're crafting product designs, moodboards, 3D interfaces, or campaign imagery, we help you move from idea to visual clarity in minutes.

explorationScaling.title: Exploration Scaling
explorationScaling.short: You have some ideas visualized but want to create a wider set of variations.
explorationScaling.long: Expand your creative horizons with our AI-powered exploration scaling service. If you've got a solid concept or a few visual ideas, we help you rapidly generate high-quality variations—stylistic, structural, or conceptual. Using the latest AI models, we scale your initial direction into a broader landscape of possibilities.

experienceOptimization.title: Experience Optimization
experienceOptimization.short: Audit and improve your digital products to ensure resonance and usability.
experienceOptimization.long: Optimize every user touchpoint of your digital product. We audit using advanced AI and UX principles to uncover friction, missed opportunities, and areas for deeper user engagement. From UI clarity to flow efficiency, we identify what's working—and what's not—then generate smart, actionable improvements.

productDesign.title: Product Design
productDesign.short: Our team of experts will help you through all stages of product development.
productDesign.long: Transform your ideas into beautifully functional products with our AI-powered product design service. We combine the speed of AI with the insight of human-centered design to help you visualize, iterate, and refine digital experiences faster than ever.

operationsConsulting.title: Operations Consulting
operationsConsulting.short: Harness the power of AI to improve business efficiency and scalability.
operationsConsulting.long: Streamline and scale with our AI-powered business operations consulting service. We use cutting-edge AI tools to analyze workflows, identify inefficiencies, and deliver data-driven recommendations that boost productivity and reduce costs.

partnerships.heading: Partnerships
partnerships.text: At Arsonist AI, collaboration is at the core of everything we do. We believe the best ideas emerge when diverse minds come together, which is why we're always seeking partnerships with forward-thinking teams and individuals in the AI space. Whether it's co-developing tools, exploring new applications, or exchanging insights, we're excited to build alongside others who share our passion for pushing boundaries.

productKpisPlugin.title: Introducing Product KPIs: Bringing Measurable Impact Into Your Design Workflow
productKpisPlugin.excerpt: Most product teams are guessing which metrics actually matter. We built a Figma plugin with 100+ industry-tested KPIs to change that.

kpis.title: Why Choosing the Right KPIs Makes All the Difference in Product Success
kpis.excerpt: In the fast-paced world of product development and UX design, "impact" isn't just corporate jargon—it's the north star that guides every decision.

containment.title: Containment, Not Catastrophe: 9 Practical Ways to Regulate AI Before It Regulates Us
containment.excerpt: The critical question we face is no longer if AI should be regulated, but how.

everydayAI.title: 10 Ways to Incorporate AI into Everyday Life
everydayAI.excerpt: AI has become an increasingly valuable tool in various aspects of life. Here are ten key ways to integrate it.

leanCanvas.title: Lean Product Canvas Interactive Figma Templates
leanCanvas.excerpt: We partnered with Jeff Gothelf and Josh Seiden to bring the Lean Product Canvas into a modern, interactive digital format.

dateAI.title: Would you date an AI?
dateAI.excerpt: People are forming deeply emotional, sometimes romantic connections with AI companions. What does this mean?

figmaBrand.title: How to Use Figma to Manage Your Brand
figmaBrand.excerpt: Figma is not just a design tool. It's the command center your brand has been waiting for.

designersAI.title: What Designers Need to Know About AI
designersAI.excerpt: Your work may already be contributing to AI model training—often without your explicit consent.

publicPerception.title: Excited or Terrified? What People Really Think About AI
publicPerception.excerpt: 52% of Americans are more concerned than excited about AI in daily life. The perceptions are complex.
